message:
fix(web): CORS Vary header, constant-time CSRF comparison

Two security hardening fixes in the web module:

1. CORS: Add Vary: Origin header when credentials are enabled, per
   the CORS spec requirement that origin-specific Allow-Origin
   responses must include Vary to prevent cache poisoning.

2. CSRF: Replace strcmp-based token validation with constant-time
   byte comparison to prevent timing side-channel attacks. The old
   strcmp short-circuits on first mismatch, leaking token content
   through response time differences. New implementation checks
   length first (leaks only length, not content), then XORs all
   bytes with accumulator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
